productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Falcon Elite M White Sports Shoes
description: Absolutely sporty in style, the adidas Falcon Elite running shoe features the brand’s patented 3-Stripes in a cool, lens-like effect. Lightweight and with superior grip and cushioning, these shoes have an extra-cushy midsole that make running all the more pleasurable. Upper Open mesh upper for absolute breathability Strategically placed synthetic overlays for added shoe structure and support Inner bootie for wrap-around comfort adidas patented 3-Stripe overlays in synthetic leather on the midfoot region for enhanced support and to exude the brand’s belief in performance Lace-up system for a snug, customized Fit Meshed and plushly padded tongue and collar made of non-slip lining for absolute breathability, snug comfort and enhanced performance Midsole Injected EVA midsole for long time lightweight cushioning Moulded and responsive EVA sockliner for in-step comfort and motion control adiPRENE inserts in the heel for superior cushioning Outsole Non-marking rubber outsole made with adiWEAR technology for absolute durability Circular lugs along the mid forefoot and medial inner heel, with waffle pattern lugs on the medial forefoot and lugs along the lateral forefoot and medial heel for absolute grip and traction Impact guidance system for a more responsive ride from heel-strike to toe-off Flex grooves in the forefoot for easy moveMent Scooped heel for absolute cushioned comfort Shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
